_comment: Source of truth for full original-language biblical text (primarily Hebrew from Sefaria). Populated using https://www.sefaria.org/api/texts/ for accuracy. The app loads this at runtime. Goal: several full verses per major reading in the defined weeks.

1.text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
1.translit: Bereshit bara Elohim et hashamayim ve'et ha'aretz
1.meaning: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.

1.text: וַיַּ֤רְא אֱלֹהִים֙ אֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֔ה וְהִנֵּה־ט֖וֹב מְאֹ֑ד וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם הַשִּׁשִּֽׁי׃
1.translit: Vayar Elohim et kol asher asah vehineh tov me'od
1.meaning: God saw all that He had made, and behold, it was very good.

3.text: וַתִּקְרָ֥א שֵׁם־יְהוָ֖ה הַדֹּבֵ֣ר אֵלֶ֑יהָ אַתָּ֗ה אֵ֣ל רֳאִ֔י
3.translit: Vatikra shem YHWH hadover eleha: 'Atah El Ro'i'
3.meaning: She called the name of the LORD who spoke to her: 'You are El-Roi' (the God who sees me).

4.meaning: Take your son, your only son, whom you love — Isaac.

4.text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אַבְרָהָ֜ם שֵׁם־הַמָּק֥וֹם הַה֖וּא יְהוָ֣ה יִרְאֶ֑ה
4.translit: Vayikra Avraham shem-hamakom hahu: YHWH Yireh
4.meaning: Abraham called the name of that place 'The LORD will see / provide'.

7.text: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֱלֹהִים֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה אֶֽהְיֶ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר אֶֽהְיֶ֑ה
7.translit: Vayomer Elohim el-Moshe: Ehyeh asher Ehyeh
7.meaning: God said to Moses: 'I AM WHO I AM' (or 'I will be what I will be').

12.text: שְׁמַ֖ע יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל יְהוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵ֖ינוּ יְהוָ֥ה אֶחָֽד׃
12.translit: Shema Yisrael, YHWH Eloheinu, YHWH Echad
12.meaning: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is one.

12.text: וְאָהַבְתָּ֛ אֵ֥ת יְהוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֶ֑יךָ בְּכָל־לְבָבְךָ֥ וּבְכָל־נַפְשְׁךָ֖ וּבְכָל־מְאֹדֶֽךָ׃
12.translit: Ve'ahavta et YHWH Eloheicha bechol-levavcha u'vechol-nafshcha u'vechol-me'odecha
12.meaning: You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your might.

13.text: הֲל֤וֹא צִוִּיתִ֙יךָ֙ חֲזַ֣ק וֶאֱמָ֔ץ אַֽל־תַּעֲרֹ֖ץ וְאַל־תֵּחָ֑ת כִּ֤י עִמְּךָ֙ יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ בְּכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר תֵּלֵֽךְ׃
13.translit: Halo tziviticha: Chazak ve'ematz, al-ta'arotz ve'al-techat, ki imcha YHWH Eloheicha bechol asher telech
13.meaning: Have I not commanded you? Be strong and courageous. Do not be terrified; do not be discouraged, for the LORD your God will be with you wherever you go.

18.meaning: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.

18.text: גַּ֤ם כִּי־אֵלֵ֨ךְ בְּגֵ֪יא צַלְמָ֫וֶ֥ת לֹא־אִ֖ירָ֥א רָ֑ע כִּי־אַתָּ֥ה עִמָּדִֽי
18.translit: Gam ki-elech be'gei tzalmavet lo-ira ra, ki atah imadi
18.meaning: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for You are with me.

22.text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
22.translit: Bereshit bara Elohim et hashamayim ve'et ha'aretz
22.meaning: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.

22.text: וַיַּ֤רְא אֱלֹהִים֙ אֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֔ה וְהִנֵּה־ט֖וֹב מְאֹ֑ד וַֽYְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽYְהִY־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם הַשִּׁשִּֽׁY׃
22.translit: Vayar Elohim et kol asher asah vehineh tov me'od
22.meaning: God saw all that He had made, and behold, it was very good.
